input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.1.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.1.2
            TITLE: air intake and fuel system location

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.1.2: Air Intake and Fuel System Location
IC.1.2 Air Intake and Fuel System Location 
All parts of the engine air system and fuel control, delivery and storage systems (including the 
throttle or carburetor, and the complete air intake system, including the air cleaner and any 
air boxes) must lie inside the Tire Surface Envelope F.1.14

final_answer: All parts of the engine air system and fuel control, delivery and storage systems (including the throttle or carburetor, and the complete air intake system, including the air cleaner and any air boxes) must lie inside the Tire Surface Envelope F.1.14
